barrier.name: Barrier
barrier.description: Select a target figure. Any ranged hit on the target is negated by the barrier on a D6 roll of 4+.

grab.name: Grab
grab.description: Select a target figure. The target may either be pushed 1D6” directly away from or pulled 1D6” directly towards the Psionic.

lift.name: Lift
lift.description: Select a friendly or neutral* target figure (up to human-sized) and move them 1D6+1” in any direction.

shroud.name: Shroud
shroud.description: Place a wall of fog entirely within range. The wall is 3” wide , the height of a typical human miniature and 1” thick.

enrage.name: Enrage
enrage.description: This power is only usable on a figure that has not yet acted this round. They immediately move a full move +2” towards the nearest visible opponent, and attempt to engage them in Brawling combat.

predict.name: Predict
predict.description: When the target character next activates, they may roll twice for any one action they perform and pick the better score.

guide.name: Guide
guide.description: An allied figure may immediately takes one Shot with any non- Area weapon carried.

psionic_scare.name: Psionic Scare
psionic_scare.description: Immediately make a Morale check for the target figure, unless they would normally be immune to morale checks.
